accounting_inventory_apis.name: QuickBooks Online API
accounting_inventory_apis.auth_notes: OAuth 2.0 using Authorization Code Flow. Requires Client ID, Client Secret, and specific scopes (e.g., com.intuit.quickbooks.accounting). Access tokens expire in 60 minutes; refresh tokens expire in 100 days.
accounting_inventory_apis.rate_limits: 100 requests per minute per realm (Company ID); 40 concurrent requests per realm.

accounting_inventory_apis.name: Xero API
accounting_inventory_apis.auth_notes: OAuth 2.0. Supports Authorization Code Flow and Client Credentials Flow (for app store apps). Requires 'tenant_id' header for all requests. PKCE is recommended for mobile/desktop apps.
accounting_inventory_apis.rate_limits: 60 requests per minute (Minute Limit); 5,000 requests per day (Daily Limit); 5 concurrent requests.

accounting_inventory_apis.name: Zoho Inventory API
accounting_inventory_apis.auth_notes: OAuth 2.0. Requires a valid Organization ID passed as a query parameter (organization_id). Uses Scopes like ZohoInventory.fullaccess.CREATE.
accounting_inventory_apis.rate_limits: 1,000 requests per minute per organization; 150 requests per 5 seconds per organization.

accounting_inventory_apis.name: FreshBooks API
accounting_inventory_apis.auth_notes: OAuth 2.0. Bearer token required in the Authorization header. Requires an 'account_id' which is retrieved via the /me endpoint after authentication.
accounting_inventory_apis.rate_limits: 120 requests per minute. Exceeding this results in a 429 Too Many Requests response.

accounting_inventory_apis.name: NetSuite SuiteTalk REST API
accounting_inventory_apis.auth_notes: Supports OAuth 2.0 (Authorization Code Grant) and Token-Based Authentication (TBA) using HMAC-SHA256. Requires Account ID, Consumer Key, Consumer Secret, Token ID, and Token Secret.
accounting_inventory_apis.rate_limits: 10 concurrent requests per user/account for standard service levels; varies based on 'SuiteCloud Plus' license tiers.

accounting_inventory_apis.name: Sage Business Cloud Accounting API
accounting_inventory_apis.auth_notes: OAuth 2.0. Requires a Subscription Key (Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key) in addition to the Bearer access token.
accounting_inventory_apis.rate_limits: 100 requests per minute; 5,000 requests per day per user.

effort_recommendation.rationale: No native node - requires HTTP Request configuration
